notes: Merge was lossless: sum of 20 batch files = 693 nodes / 738 edges, identical to assembled output. No nodes or edges dropped.

Consistent with project state (Learn/Play tabs not yet built, D4 reveal stub).

importMap empty and only 1 'imports' edge present, as expected: single-target Swift app with no tree-sitter Swift parser; cross-file architecture is correctly modeled via depends_on (242), contains (389), calls (21), exports (50) instead. Not flagged as a defect per dispatch instructions.

The 'Fixed' section pattern counts are reasonable: 5 bare-path->class: prefix additions (~0.7% of nodes) and 15 edge-reference rewrites — small, localized LLM output normalization, well under the >30% systemic-issue threshold.

Rare edge types verified semantically valid: 'implements' (VaylDirector->OnboardingStage), single 'imports' (ConversationCard->ConversationCardTypes same-file-pair), and 5 'related' edges all connect real existing nodes.
